name: Easter Bunny and Egg Basket
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a cheerful upright Easter bunny with long floppy ears and a fluffy tail, holding a woven basket filled with decorated eggs, a happy smile, a little bow at its neck, sitting in short grass with a flower or two

name: Decorated Easter Egg
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a single large standing Easter egg decorated with bold horizontal stripes, rows of dots, zigzag bands, and a wavy ribbon across the middle, resting in a small tuft of grass

name: Easter Egg Basket
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a woven wicker basket brimming with rounded Easter eggs of different patterns, a few blades of grass and a tied bow on the handle, a couple of eggs resting on the ground beside it

name: Fluffy Easter Chick
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a tiny round fluffy baby chick standing on two little feet, a small triangle beak, big sparkly eyes, soft feathers, and a single flower or blade of grass beside it

name: Chick in Easter Egg
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a cute baby chick peeking out of a cracked Easter egg, the top half of the shell tilted like a little hat, tiny wings resting on the broken edge, happy eyes, a few decorative dots on the shell

name: Bunny Holding Easter Egg
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a small chubby cartoon bunny sitting and hugging one big patterned Easter egg almost as large as itself, round cheeks, long ears flopping to one side, a content smile

name: Easter Egg Hunt Scene
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a spring garden scene with several decorated Easter eggs hidden among grass tufts and behind a small bush, a happy bunny crouching as if searching, a butterfly fluttering above and a few flowers

name: Easter Egg Close-Up
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: one very large Easter egg filling most of the frame, covered edge to edge with intricate decorative patterns of swirls, teardrops, flowers, lattice, and dots arranged in neat bands to fill in

name: Easy Easter Egg for Toddlers
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: one big simple Easter egg with thick bold outlines and just three or four wide empty bands across it, plain and roomy, sitting on a short patch of grass, very easy to color

name: Spring Easter Flowers
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a cheerful bunch of spring Easter flowers including tulips and daffodils with rounded petals and leafy stems, tied together with a ribbon bow, a small butterfly resting on one bloom

name: Easter Bunny and Chick Friends
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a soft Easter bunny sitting beside a tiny baby chick, the two leaning together as friends with happy smiles, a decorated egg resting between them, a few flowers and grass around their feet

name: Easter Egg Tree
subject: holidays/easter
prompt: a small leafy spring tree with several decorated Easter eggs hanging from its branches by little loops, each egg with a different stripe or dot pattern, a couple of birds and blossoms among the leaves
